mapper.select: SELECT mapping.OBJECT_NO, mapping.DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD, mapping.BUSINESS_AREA_CD, mapping.BUSINESS_TYPE_CD, mapping.OBJECT_NM, mapping.REV_NO, mapping.CURRENT_PAGE_NO, mapping.TOTAL_PAGE_NO, mapping.PROTECT_YN, mapping.OBJECT_ID, fileInfo.ORG_FILE_NM AS fileViewNm, fileInfo.FILE_SIZE, fileInfo.FILE_NO, fileInfo.FILE_NM, fileInfo.ORG_FILE_NM, fileInfo.FILE_PATH_NM FROM DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING mapping INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_FILE fileInfo ON mapping.REQUEST_NO = fileInfo.REQUEST_NO AND mapping.OBJECT_ID = fileInfo.OBJECT_ID WHERE mapping.REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo}
